meta.description: Thomas Jensen - Rust developer focused on systems, native tooling, and open source. Contributor to Zed and builder of Crabdash.

metadata.name: Thomas Jensen
metadata.description: Thomas Jensen - Rust developer focused on systems, native tooling, and open source. Contributor to Zed and builder of Crabdash.

hero.description: Focused on systems work, native tooling, and open source. I contribute to Zed and build desktop and backend tools with a strong bias toward performance, reliability, and control.
hero.currentlyBuilding: Currently building: Crabdash — a native homelab dashboard

projects.name: Zed Editor - Contributions
projects.description:
- PR #26211: Implemented Extended Terminal Option in Zed (Rust + GPUI), including option wiring and validation.
- PR #50653: Fixed Windows manifest path handling for extension uploads to WSL remotes in Zed's extension host.
- Zed Guild member and maintainer of the Gruber Darker theme extension.

projects.name: Crabdash
projects.description: Crabdash is a native homelab dashboard built in Rust and GPUI to replace scattered terminal commands with one focused control surface for Docker containers, local services, disks, and remote Linux machines.

projects.name: Appleosophy
projects.description: Appleosophy was my first real shipping project: the place where I learned how to take a product from idea to App Store release, working across iOS, API integration, and the practical details of actually delivering software.

experience.subtitle: Contributions & Projects
experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Open-source contributions to Zed and selected personal Rust projects that reflect how I like to build.
